title: Decision No. 8 of 2017 Regarding Type Approval Conditions for Short Range Radio Devices
summary: Governs short-range radio devices used in many IoT deployments, with TRA’s IoT paper confirming that IoT short-range device import and use must comply with Annex 1 to the SRD Regulation and obtain a type approval certificate.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Sets type approval conditions for short-range radio devices.

notes: Related instruments: Type Approval Regulation, National Frequency Plan 2024, Position Paper on the Internet of Things
